hotel_name: Nhà khách Tam Cốc One & Khách sạn Ninh Bình (Tam Coc Guest House One & Hotel Ninh Binh)

reviews.title: נורא לא להתקרב
reviews.text:
מלון חדש אבל הם לא יודעים לנהל אותו בכלל, 
עברנו 3 חדרים בגלל השירות הגרוע שלהם
בחדר הראשון היה ג׳וק שהרגנו בשנייה שנכנסו ואחרי המקלחת כל המים נזלו אל החדר והמסדרון, על זה העבירו אותנו חדר 
בחדר השני שבאנו להתקלח פשוט לא היו מים נורמליים. פעם אחת רותחים ואז בשנייה עוברים לקפואים וההפך. העובד שדיבר איתנו בגוגל טרנסלייט בדק כמה פעמים ולא הצליח לסדר ובחוצפתו הציע לנו להתקלח במקלחת משותפת. אחרי שיחת פייסטיים עם המנהלת שלו הפיתרון היחיד שלה היה להעביר אותנו עוד פעם חדר ל״חדר פיצוי״ שתכלס הייתה בו רק מרפסת עישון. 
לא הסכימו אפילו להחזיר לנו את הכסף על הלילה הנוראי שעברנו איתם. 
לא להתקרב!!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very comfortable and clean
reviews.negatives: The bikes weren’t good, very demage

reviews.title: Terrible odor in the room
reviews.text: This hotel was very affordable, but unfortunately, it reflected the price. Our room had a constant sewer odor, and the front desk staff was not helpful in addressing the issue. The sheets were stained when we arrived, and even after having them changed twice, the problem persisted. We were very relieved to check out.

reviews.title: Perfect place for a few days.
reviews.positives: Good spot, not in the craziness of Tam Coc. Staff was very friendly and always ready to assist as needed, whether it was with grabbing a bicycle, making breakfast or suggesting what to do. Big thank you to Ken for making sure I was booked on the right bus, and letting me have a swim & shower before getting on in the evening. Would come back just for the hospitality from the staff!!
reviews.negatives: Would prefer if room was refreshed every day and more than 2 towels in the room.

reviews.title: Business is very boring.
reviews.text: Our family consists of two families, and when we booked two rooms at the same time, the hotel only agreed to arrange one room. After we arrived and insisted on a refund to rent two rooms elsewhere, they then arranged for us to stay at the same hotel, otherwise, each family would have been at a different hotel, 500 meters apart. The other place was like a guesthouse. It was incredibly frustrating. Moreover, the room had no refrigerator, no TV. The swimming pool was still not operational. For breakfast, there was only a bowl of rice noodles and bread. On the positive side, the hotel was new, so it was clean. In general, this hotel left a very bad impression on our family’s trip to Ninh Binh.

reviews.title: Quiet, spacious and brand new rooms
reviews.positives: Spacious, clean and big room. Quiet and almost new. Nice view from the windows. I received the room at 8am so I cannot complain about it. Staff was very nice and gave me great recommendations.
reviews.negatives: The hand towels were missing, but I did not bother asking for them. Trash bin in the room and a refrigerator could make the stay even better.

reviews.title: Poor cleaning
reviews.text: I was there for 6 nights and even though I repeatedly asked at reception for my bins and room to be cleaned it wasn’t done once throughout my stay.

reviews.title: Fantastic views, beautiful pool and large clean rooms. Helpful staff
reviews.positives: Well situated about 1km from the business of Tam Coc center. Very clean throughout. Large rooms, we had a small balcony with garden/hill views and a fridge. Plenty of hot water. The pool was lovely with a shade area and sun beds. The staff were so kind and Kan went out of her way to assist us with onward travel. Her brother is also a taxi/Grab driver. The free bicycles were a bonus. We would definitely stay here again.
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Not bad!
reviews.text: We had a good stay at this hotel. The facilities are nicely kept and decently clean.  The receptionist is very sweet and explained to us many of the nearby attractions and also helped us book our bus to the next city. The breakfast was underwhelming; just a plain unseasoned omelette, sliced plain baguette and a few slices of fruit. We ended up having breakfast elsewhere for the rest of our stay. It was convenient to have free bicycles and a motorbike for rent but they both could use better maintenance. The tires needed air, the motorbike struggled to start up and the headlight didn’t work which made for a dangerous ride home after we had dinner at a restaurant. The pool looked enticing but it didn’t seem to have any filtration system. Overall, it satisfied our needs and if you don’t have stellar expectations, i’m sure you will be satisfied as well.

reviews.title: Everything good
reviews.positives: Very clean, staff were extremely helpful

reviews.title: Clean & new
reviews.text: Newer construction clean room with wide open windows were good, but very low pressure shower, very limited breakfast choices, no TV, and distant location were not so good.  Still good value for the money but I would try other hotel ifbI am in the area next time

reviews.title: This was such a great find in Tom Coc! It’s one of the better Hotels I’ve stayed at in Vietnam. The location is perfect
reviews.positives: The property is new, clean, nice, and the staff is so friendly. Big Comfortable rooms w/ amenities.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I stayed in the deluxe king room for 4 nights and the modern room has a comfortable bed. Everything is new since it's a new building and the property garden and main area is comfortable and esthetically pleasing. The front counter person Ken is wonderful! Always greeting her guests and quickly taking care of their requests. The establishment is lucky to have her! Highly recommend this guest house for the nice, clean rooms and service. Thank you!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Fell like home❤️❤️❤️ Warmly welcome and hospitality.
Really miss a little white cat and a fat dog name Banh Mi (bread). All them are so friendly ❤️❤️❤️

reviews.title: Awesome budget hotel
reviews.text: Hotel had friendly and helpful staff. Elevator provided. Room was clean and plenty of space. Free bicycle rental. However quite a bit walking distance from city center

reviews.title: Wonderful place run by very hospitable and kind people
reviews.positives: Clean, friendly, quiet location, with a cute dog, and a simple delicious breakfast included

reviews.title: It’s good hotel
reviews.text:
A solid hotel for a short stay. Clean and modern rooms. The breakfast is well okay i guess. The location is quite far from the center but they can provide you with a bike for free.
Some other downside regarding the room is the smell from the toilet. I don’t about the other rooms but mine had some weird stench but it was still very clean.

reviews.title: Clean and modern hotel
reviews.positives: Very nice people, always available to help. The free bikes were handy to go to the center and they also organized a sleeping bus for us to go to Huê. The breakfast was good, you could order either fried eggs, scrambled eggs, omelette or fried rice or noodles.
reviews.negatives: Wifi was not working well in our room, just at the lobby. The shower can make the bathroom floor wet, it would be nice if they could provide a towel for that. But they did come and clean it when we asked.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: They were so kind in this hotel. We could check in earlier and even after check-out, before leaving in the evening they offered that we can take a shower. They provided bikes for free, it was a great way to explore the city. Everything was very accessible from the hotel's location. The downside was that there were only 5 options to choose from for breakfast and the room was not so clean.

reviews.title: I was happy with every aspect of my stay
reviews.negatives: I enjoyed every aspect of my stay here. The free bicycles were a real bonus that I utilized and I'd definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: Modern and clean rooms
reviews.text: New build, Nicely furnished and comfortable beds.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Loved the hotel! It's only like a 12 minute walk to the town center, and they also offer free bike rentals. Staff was so helpful and very nice. If I'm ever back in Vietnam, I  would stay here again.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. Loved it all.

reviews.title: Great stay for the price
reviews.text:
Rooms is big and comfortable 
Location is 4 minutes by car to the center 
Very quiet area 
Ney built so apps like grab or certain maps don't show this place
You need to ask for room cleaning at the reception 
The rooms has no mini fridge 
I think its a great value for money

reviews.title: An all around great place to stay at for a really reasonable price
reviews.positives: After staying at two other homestays that both had issues (one had excessively loud construction going on next door) I was prompted to try yet another location, I ended up at this place which worked out great. It was quiet at night, plenty of hot water for the shower, decent wifi and the main host at the front desk spoke decent English and she was always helpful. The free use of bicycles was great and I used one all four days while there. All around, I was totally happy with everything.

reviews.title: affordable stay
reviews.text: room was nice and clean upon arrival. staff were lovely and super helpful. location is good. only downside was shower completely flooded the room as the drains were blocked with hair!

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.positives: Free bike rental, near the center of tam coc and the touristic sites, very nice and helpful staff , a very cozt and calm hotel
reviews.negatives: Everything was perfect

reviews.title: Amazing stay
reviews.text: Amazing stay in tam coc. Seemingly a proud family run hotel (i assume by their ethics) that take pride in their work and hotel. Each staff member was a joy to deal with, we extended our stay twice. Very clean and modern. Any little problems we did have were dealt with swiftly by the happy to help staff. The free bicycles offered were super convinient and easy to use. The pool area was beautiful. The complimentary breakfast was perfect. The only thing more i could want is a TV in the room and some washing machine facilities to use for ourself. Other than that, a perfect stay and highly recommend.

reviews.title: Great hotel at a great price
reviews.positives: We stayed here for a few nights and really liked it. The guesthouse is new, clean, and the receptionist was so kind and helpful. She even upgraded us to family room for a night. Breakfast was simple and limited, but honestly okay considering how affordable the room was. They offer free bicycles and got a motorbike rental as well. Great value for money overall — comfortable stay for our little family.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Would stay again!
reviews.text: Such a great stay! Located only a short walk or a quick taxi ride away from lots of bars and restaurants. The rooms were very modern and clean and the breakfast in the morning was a bonus. The staff were very kind and attentive also.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: A fantastic, modern hotel with all the facilities you need. Everything was new and clean, just what we were searching for. The breakfast had a lot to choose from, and the girls at the reception were super kind!

reviews.title: Welcoming Stay
reviews.text: Staff were so kind and really care for each guest. They give many recommendations and cook breakfast for you. Unfortunately during my stay the pool was closed. The free bikes are a nice touch as it is located outside the main area of Tam Coc.

reviews.title: You won’t disappointed !
reviews.positives: Everything ! The owner and staff are really helpful, friendly and they have good service mind. I love breakfast there, especially Pho chicken, so GOOD !!

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.text:
The only thing missing is a TV and a fridge which would have improved our stay.
The staff are great.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: El personal muy amable, te facilitan cualquier gestión. La habitación e instalaciones estaban limpias. Nos dejaron ducharnos después de haber dejado la habitación y nos dieron toallas. Incluso el día que llegamos nos invitaron al desayuno que no lo teníamos incluido ese día. Totalmente recomendable.
reviews.negatives: Reservamos un sleeper bus desde el alojamiento y supongo que por un mal entendido, nos sacaron un billete que no era con la compañía que le habíamos dicho (HK) llegando con una hora de retraso y siendo de peor calidad, además nos cobró 5€ más de lo que pone en la web.

reviews.title: Very good guesthouse
reviews.text:
Clean and newly built guesthouse/hotel. The room is great although the bed is very hard.
The staff is very friendly and helping.
However, two minors issues, soap and shampoo are not daily renewed. And breakfast is a bit chaotic.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Totalmente recomendable

reviews.negatives: Si acaso, tener en cuenta mejorar la regulación de la temperatura del agua en la ducha y añadiría una papelera en la habitación

Además tienen pileta en la terraza y buen desayuno. La atención fue impecable y amable siempre. Bicicletas gratuitas y tambien renta de motocicletas. El precio calidad es excelente

reviews.title: Good place to stay
reviews.text: The room was very good and the staff very friendly. You can take breakfast and rent a scooter. You can also do your laundry for 40K. But, it was noisy with the dogs barking and the rooster.

reviews.title: Todo un 10.
reviews.positives: Todo un 10.El personal es super amable,te ayudan con todo.Rentan motos y te explican todas las cosas importantes que visitar.La dueña del hotel nos ofreció te y café gratis cuando estábamos esperando el taxi que hizo ella misma.Las camas son super cómodas y está totalmente nuevo.Especial mención a la chica de recepción que fue maravillosa!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Highly recommend great value for money. Room was great and staff were super friendly. Free bicycle (which we could also use after checkout time). We had a nightbus and the staff said we could use the shower after checkout if we would like to.

reviews.title: Hôtel moderne un peu excentré
reviews.positives: L’hôtel est très moderne avec des chambres spacieuses et bien équipées. Il est situé en dehors du centre ville, accessible avec des vélos gratuits à 5-10 minutes. Le petit déjeuner est simple. Il y a toujours quelqu’un disponible à la réception.
reviews.negatives: Les prestations sont un peu plus chères que dans les autres établissements (lessive, location de scooter).

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: They were so helpful. I had a night bus after I checked out and they let me keep my bags there all day, gave me a bike for the day and even said I could come back and shower before my bus.

reviews.title: Great place to stay in Tam Coc
reviews.text:
This guest house was a really nice place to stay in a quiet area but close to the town, especially if you have transport. The staff were all really friendly and helpful. The rooms are. comfortable and spacious and the AC works well. 

The only thing I would say is that the shower is either boiling hot (like, dangerously hot) or cold, not in between, and it was the same in both rooms we had. So maybe that needs looking at.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
très bon hotel avec chambre très propre et fonctionnelle.
le personnel est très accessible et gentil. ils nous ont aider à organiser notre visite ainsi que les transports. 
les vélos sont bien dans l’ensemble.
reviews.negatives:
le petit déjeuner est pas très varié mais le service est efficace. 
il n’y a pas trop de restaurant aux alentours.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.text: The hotel is newly built, so the room facilities are pretty good. I had a room with a nice glass view of the scenery, but the downside is that it can get a bit hot around noon to early afternoon, as the air conditioner is right at the entrance, making it a bit warm. If you reduce the temperature as much as possible and turn on an additional fan, it becomes comfortable. The showerhead in the bathroom is leaking, which is a bit inconvenient, but it's manageable. The hotel should add full-length mirrors with a makeup table; I like to check my outfit and do my makeup, but it’s a bit inconvenient without it. The wardrobe is very spacious, so there's plenty of room for storage. The bed is a bit firm for me, but it's still okay to sleep on. Breakfast is included in the room package, the food is delicious, and the home staff are very enthusiastic. All requests for room cleaning, drinking water, and towels are handled very comfortably. I rented a motorbike at the home for 150,000 VND per day. I recommend everyone to give it a try!

reviews.title: tres bonne option pour un sejour à Tam kok
reviews.positives: le rapport qualité prix est tres interessant avec un personnel aux petits soins. bien que situé à 1 ou 2 km du centre animé de TamKok, le pret de velo, permet d'y accéder très facilement.
reviews.negatives: le petit dejeuner est inclus dans le prix mais est sans intéret. mieux vaut aller le prendre ailleurs.

reviews.title: Definitely will stop by again.

reviews.negatives:

reviews.title: Super highly recommended hotel
reviews.text: I was worried because I couldn't find any Korean reviews, so I booked at this new hotel, and it turned out to be very good. The staff is extremely friendly, and the cleanliness is excellent. However, it is a bit far from the main street, but it's easy to get around by motorcycle or bicycle. I recommend it.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Nous sommes arrivées à 2h du matin et avons été très bien accueillies.
reviews.negatives: Très loin du centre ville de tam coc

reviews.title: Would stay again
reviews.text: Great value for money, close to all attractions, very clean and Staff were friendly

reviews.title: Rapport qualité prix top
reviews.positives:
Les propriétaires sont super agréables et accueillants, nous avons toujours été déçu par l’accueil des hôtes en général durant notre voyage au Vietnam, et le fait d’avoir eu un accueil aussi chaleureux, nous avons beaucoup apprécié. 
Le petit-déjeuner était plutôt standard mais pour le rapport-qualité prix, c’est correct.
reviews.negatives: Il manquait juste une télévision dans la chambre.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean room, friendly staff, and great location. I enjoyed my stay. High recommended

reviews.title: Bonne découverte
reviews.positives: Le rapport qualité prix, belle chambre et belle salle de bain. Donne sur une route où il y a peu de passage. Grande baie vitrée
reviews.negatives: Il y avait des travaux près de l’établissement jusqu’à 10pm…

reviews.title: Nice and good
reviews.text:
Overall, it was a very good experience. Even though the hotel is a little far from the city center, they provide bicycles for free, which is a nice touch. I also rented a motorcycle from the hotel for 150k, which made getting around much easier.

The receptionist was very helpful and friendly, adding to the positive experience. Overall, a great stay and good value for money.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Employés bienveillants, les chambres sont confortables et propres! Et des bicyclettes sont à disposition.

L’hôtel est à Tam coc proche de toutes commodités :)

Bon rapport qualité/prix :)

La dame à l’accueil a été adorable et nous a réservé notre billet de train pour Dong Hoi! Cela nous a bien aidé !

Nous recommandons !

reviews.title: Felt like home
reviews.text:
The room was very clean, very comfy beds, nice bathroom. The staff is perfect, such a nice and kind family ! 
We loved it

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La dame de l’accueil a été incroyablement gentille, nous avons réservé notre bus directement via l’hôtel et elle nous a donné un paquet de chips pour le voyage ! L’hôtel était propre, confortable et les vélos mis à disposition sont en superbe état ! Je recommande a 100% !!

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Great stay here, front desk went above and beyond to help wherever they could!

reviews.title: Exceptional

Le personnel super, le lieu accessible et un peu éloigné du centre et du bruit, vélo gratuit.
Les deux chiens mascottes de l'hôtel.
Petit déjeuner simple mais bon et 6 choix différents.
Allez essayer le pickleball à côté c'est super chouette et pas cher :)

Le rapport qualité prix est top
reviews.negatives: De l'autre côté du fleuve une usine avec du bruit. Pas gênant à l'intérieur de l'hôtel mais sur le rooftop par exemple on entend beaucoup.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Nice place. Comfy lobby.
Clean room and nice staff.
Not in the middle of town so the place is quieter.
Breakfast ok but minimal.
Bikes are free to go around the different sites which is cool.
2 cute dogs in the lobby to play with!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nous avons passé deux nuits dans cet hôtel et tout s’est très bien passé. Le Personnel est très sympa et s’occupe parfaitement de ses clients. L’hôtel propose plusieurs services comme Service de Taxi, de restauration et dispose d’une piscine.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean and beautiful hotel within the price range, convenient location near the center and Tam Coc attractions. The staff is enthusiastic, cheerful, and warm. I had a very satisfying 3-day, 2-night vacation, worth the experience.

reviews.title: Des amours à la réception ❣️
reviews.positives:
Après avoir été dans plusieurs hôtels avec des environnements bruyants à Tam coc, j'ai enfin trouvé un endroit calme. Un peu plus éloigné mais avec un vélo ou scooter c'est parfait.

Un petit peu plus cher mais avec une chambre très grande, très lumineuse, même luxueuse et moderne. Conforme aux photos. 

J'ai particulièrement apprécié la gentillesse du personnel, de la propriétaire, du personnel d'étage et de la dame de la réception. 

On m'a beaucoup aidé à organiser mon séjour, pour les visites, pour mes petits déjeuners préparés avec amour, pour mon bus de retour. 

J'ai dû rentrer en France pour un décès familial et j'ai reçu beaucoup d'attentions. 

Les 2 personnes à la réception sont d'une gentillesse incroyable. J'ai fait presque 3 mois d'hôtel entre la Thaïlande et le Vietnam, j'ai rencontré une majorité de personnes très aidantes et bienveillantes. Mais ici leur douceur ne me donnait pas envie de partir. 🥹🫶

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.text:
We stayed for 2 nights.
The place was great and clean.
The stuff were super helpful and nice, they helped us with booking attractions and rides, and gave us great(!) tips to explore the area with bikes (which were free), and was always available for question.
Highly recommend this place!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
L'hôtel était tout neuf (ouverture début Mars)

Accueil très chaleureux,  grand volume, emplacement au calme et pas loin du centre avec le prêt de Vélo

reviews.title: Tam Coc
reviews.text: We have a wonderful 4 nights stay at this facility. The hotel staff are friendly and make us feel at home.  The location is perfect for sight seeing with free bicycle provided.   Room was clean and spacious with all the amenities we needed. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Parfait.
reviews.positives:
C'est un tout nouvel hôtel ouvert le 1er mars 2025
C'est donc très moderne et très propre.
reviews.negatives: Tout est top si on voulait vraiment chercher un point négatif c'est qu'il n'y a pas de tv ni de frigo mais franchement pas besoin 👌🏻👌🏻

reviews.title: Perfectly placed
reviews.text: Despite a typhoon passing by hours before, cutting power to the whole area, the staff did all the could to make my arrive simple. I slept so well, rising early, fallen trees, and property damage were evident all over. The hotel has a nice little restaurant, very comfortable lounge area, there is even a roof top bar which I believe alot of guests don't know about. Free bicycle hire and scooter rental is available. Travel booking for my onward travel was handled by the hotel, I really enjoyed my stay, it's certainly a place I will return to in the future. Recommended

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Nous avons passé un très bon séjour dans cet hôtel :)

L’accueil est tellement chaleureux et agréable !

Nous avons eu un petit soucis par rapport à la chambre et quand nous leur avons dit, ils nous ont tout de suite changé de chambre ! 

Tout est propre et tout le monde est adorable ❤️ 

Merci encore !

reviews.title: Great spot!
reviews.text: Tam Coc Guest House One is only six months old, the rooms are clean and fresh, linens are new, water pressure in the bathroom is great! The staff is especially helpful and motorbike rental is hassle free. Everyone at the hotel is approachable and the owner is eager to pour you tea. Ken took time to speak with me and understand what I wanted to see during my time in Ninh Binh and she gave me excellent recommendations! She was so sweet she even brought me a special breakfast one morning!! The area is quiet and peaceful with plenty of opportunities to catch sunrise or sunset depending on which direction your room is facing. Located just outside of town you're an 8 minute bike ride or 5 minutes on scooter. Unfortunately the pool was dirty during my stay, but its a great spot and great value. Thank you for sharing your place with me!

reviews.title: Super accueil et conseils
reviews.positives: Le personnel est attentionné et formidable ! Il nous a conseillé pour notre programme de visite.

reviews.title: Review of Tam Cốc Hotel
reviews.text: I stayed here for one night and rented a motorbike, the staff were very helpful. The accommodation is chill with a pool and garden and includes breakfast. Everyone is very friendly and the scenery in Ninh Binh makes me feel nostalgic. Since I was on a pilgrimage, I booked a room with two beds which was a bit inconvenient and the room was a bit small, but for the price, it's fine. Next time I come back, I will try a different room, I will be back to Ninh Binh soon ❤️

reviews.title: Uns haben besonders das gute Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis, die moderne Ausstattung, das bequeme Bett und die helle Fenster
reviews.positives: Gefallen hat mir das preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis sowie die moderne Ausstattung, das bequeme Bett und die helle Fensterfront in unserem Zimmer.
reviews.negatives: Leider wurden bei der Hotel-Wäscherei sechs unserer T-Shirts beschädigt. Auf zuvor sauberen Shirts sind nach dem Waschen schwarze Schlieren, gelbe Flecken und sogar ein großer schwarzer Fleck auf dem Ärmel entstanden. Der Versuch des Hotels, die Flecken erneut auszuwaschen, blieb erfolglos – was passieren kann. Unangenehm war jedoch der Umgang mit dem Vorfall: Statt über eine Entschädigung nachzudenken, wurde darauf bestanden, dass wir die komplette Wäsche bezahlen. Zudem wurde uns unterstellt, bereits befleckte Kleidung abgegeben zu haben, obwohl die Art der Schäden eindeutig aus der Wäscherei stammt. Trotz eines entstandenen Schadens von etwa 10–15 € pro T-Shirt mussten wir am Ende die volle Rechnung von 250 k begleichen. Schade…

reviews.title: Nice rooms
reviews.text: The rooms and overall Homestay are nice however the rooms get quite hot and it takes a lot of time to cool down.

reviews.title: Ein sehr schönes kleines Hotel mit sehr sehr netten Personal wird als Familienbetrieb geführt.. Die Fahrräder sind grati
reviews.positives: Die Unterkunft ist neu und sehr schön eingerichtet. Es hat keinen TV ist aber auch nicht nötig in den Ferien.
reviews.negatives: Das Frühstück kann ein bisschen abwechslungsreicher. Sein Butter und Marmelade werde ich schon in Ordnung.

reviews.title: Beautiful room, friendly staff, reasonable price.
reviews.text:
I was impressed by this place because the owner is extremely friendly and accommodating, always willing to help me and meet my needs during my stay.

The room looks very new and spacious, with a nice view, but the air conditioning is a bit weak, so the room may take some time to cool off during hot seasons. The hotel has rental bikes that work well; I rode a bike all the way from Tam Coc to Trang An Hoa Lu without any issues. The location is also convenient for getting around.

Overall, if you're looking for a moderately priced place to stay, this is a very good choice.

reviews.title: Maximal hilfsbereit und immer ein Lächeln
reviews.positives: Die Frau an der Rezeption war extrem hilfsbereit, sie hat alles probiert um unsere anspruchsvollen Wünsche für die Weiterreise zu erfüllen, so wie ich es noch nirgends erlebt habe, einfach top und unübertreffbar!!!
reviews.negatives:
Beim Duschen war es schwierig, eine angenehme Temperatur einzustellen.
Wer keine Nudelsuppe zum Frühstück mag, wird es hier eher schwierig haben.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The new KS is clean and the service is enthusiastic, however, breakfast is just simple.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Eine sehr nette, warmherzige Familie. Herzlichen Dank!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The rooms are clean and completely new. The staff is dedicated, and it's fully equipped with amenities at a mid-range price. There are bicycles and motorbikes available for transportation. The only downside is that the location on the taxi app is slightly difficult to find.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Schönes Hotel mit schön angelegtem Garten 

Wir baten um einen früheren Check in den wir ohne Probleme erhalten haben und sogar noch ein Frühstück.
Zimmer sind sauber mit genug Stau Raum Wasserkocher, Fön und alles was man braucht.
Buchen von Tickets oder Touren sind easy möglich dort. Es gibt genügend Fahrräder (in sehr gutem Zustand) kostenlos zum ausleihen und motorbikes zum mieten. 
Nach dem Check out durften wir noch in der Lobby auf den Bus warten und wurden mit Tee und Obst wunderbar verpflegt.
Vielen Dank für den schönen Aufenthalt wir kommen gerne wieder
reviews.negatives: Das wir nur eine Nacht hier eingeplant hatten 😀

reviews.title: 3 nights in Ninh Bình
reviews.text: Love everyone here! Already gave great review for the hotel and Khen, just want to say thank you to Hiếu for all your great helps.  Hiếu is such a gentleman and so kind!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Alles, von den Mitarbeitern bis zum Zimmer war alles sehr gut.
reviews.negatives: Ein bisschen außerhalb, weiß man aber wenn man bucht.

reviews.title: 3 nights in Ninh Binh
reviews.text: Love the hotel, so new and clean. It is a bit outside of the center of Tam Coc but with free bikes, you can bike to Hang Mua easily and even Trang An. My daughter loved biking around Tam Coc to see the rice fields. Everyone here was so nice and kind, especially Khen. Thank you so much for our 3 nights staying in your hotel,  will definitely rebook next time we visit Ninh Binh. Thank you Khen! You are the best!

reviews.title: Perfekt
reviews.positives: Alles war super!

reviews.title: Forestival
reviews.text: Newly built homes with clean rooms and many amenities, the homes are currently building a swimming pool so it's not operational yet. The staff are enthusiastic and guided us; I came back from a concert at 12:50 AM and the ladies there were still awake and cooked noodles for us, and even offered us some fruit. The homes provide breakfast and the coffee is also decent.

reviews.title: Super Guesthouse/Hotel abseits des Trubels
reviews.positives:
Die Unterkunft ist neu und liegt abseits der Hauptstraße und des Trubels in Tam Coc. Dadurch ist es sehr ruhig. Wir hatten ein Zimmer in der 3. Etage mit einem kleinen Balkon. Das Zimmer ist etwas klein, aber mit allem Notwendigen eingerichtet. Praktisch ist die Duschabtrennung im Bad. Im Zimmer gibt es viele Steckdosen. Das Licht ist hell und das Zimmer kann durch Vorhänge bzw. Rollos gut verdunkelt werden. Die Scheiben sind getönt, sodass Sonnenlicht zurückgehalten wird. 

Das Personal, besonders die Rezeptionistin Ken, ist sehr freundlich, gut aufgelegt und immer hilfsbereit. Uns wurde bei verschiedenen Ausflügen und der Buchung unseres Anschlusstransfers geholfen. Ken machte uns auf ein Festival in Ninh Binh aufmerksam, das wir sonst verpasst hätten. WiFi war sehr schnell und problemlos. Von der Einrichtung her und dem Service ist es eher ein Hotel als ein Guesthouse. 

Wir würden hier jederzeit wieder buchen.
reviews.negatives: Jammern auf hohem Niveau: Ein Kühlschrank im Zimmer wäre schön. Die Auswahl beim Frühstück könnte etwas größer sein.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
Mọi thứ mới, đẹp, sạch và thoáng. 
Nếu phòng có thêm cái bàn nhỏ và tủ lạnh nhỏ thì tuyệt nhất. Đi trúng mấy hôm nắng nhất năm nên thèm nước mát. 
Chị chủ rất nhiệt tình chu đáo, thấy mình đi nắng về tặng luôn 2 chai laive mát lạnh 🥰

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Sehr sehr liebes Personal. Die Zimmer waren sehr schön und neu. Das Frühstück war gut und sie haben uns beim Planen der Reise geholfen bzw haben für uns eine Tour gebucht. Liegt etwas außerhalb aber trotzdem eine gute Lage, da man problemlos einen Scooter oder Fahrrad mieten konnte.

reviews.title: Enjoy a wonderful holiday in Ninh Binh.
reviews.text: The hotel is quite new, with all the necessary amenities. The rooms are airy and spacious. What I like here is the people; from the owner to the staff, everyone is very friendly and hospitable. If I have the chance to visit Ninh Bình again, I will definitely come back here ^^

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: L'hotel ha una buona posizione, a pochi minuti dalla via principale e vista sulle risaie
reviews.negatives: Quando siamo arrivati le lenzuola del letto erano sporche e la colazione era scarsa

reviews.title: New, clean
reviews.text: Very new Ks, extremely beautiful mountain view. The room is spacious and airy. The staff is very lovely and enthusiastic. I stayed for one night, then booked another night. I will come back.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Struttura praticamente nuova e di livello... Camera perfetta con tutto il necessario
reviews.negatives: La posizione è un po' defilata dal centro di Tam Coc... 25 minuti a piedi ma comunque ci sono le biciclette dell'hotel a disposizione... La colazione è super essenziale... Anche troppo

reviews.title: Brand new hotel all good
reviews.text: All well nice had a good stay

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I letti comodi, il balcone sul giardino molto curato, il bagno ben organizzato, in pratica tutto perfetto

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Lovely newly built guesthouse/ hotel. Staffs are very nice and accommodating especially to Ken who went all the way to nearby restaurants to try and open my wine  since they don’t have a wine opener. Talked to madame owner and said she’ll buy a wine opener the next day. Sunyo was helpful too for driving me to the bus pick up point not far away from the hotel since it was raining  instead of waiting for a grab taxi. Overall, hotel was cheap and gave more than the value I paid.. I recommend this to anyone going to Tam Coc Ninh Binh.

reviews.title: Un bel soggiorno a ninh binh
reviews.positives: Personale gentile e premuroso, le bici sono utilizzabili gratuitamente e ci sono 2 meravigliosi cagnolini alla reception che rendono l'ambiente più allegro
reviews.negatives: Nel complesso è andato tutto bene

reviews.title: Enjoyable Stay
reviews.text:
The host is exceptionally welcoming and helpful, who offers valuable info about different routes and sightseeing spots around the place and offers free bicycles.
We enjoyed our stay here very much.

reviews.title: Oké verblijf, maar er zijn wel wat verbeterpuntjes
reviews.positives: De locatie is fantastisch. Je hebt een mooi uitzicht. Het was heel fijn dat je gratis gebruik kon maken van de fietsen. Het personeel was super vriendelijk en hielpen je met alles. Ik kreeg zelfs gratis thee en springrolls toen ik even in de lobby aan het bellen was. Ze hebben een uitgebreid menu waar je ten alle tijden eten kan bestellen en dit brengen ze zelfs naar je kamer.
reviews.negatives: Helaas vielen er ook een aantal dingen tegen. Het zwembad is al langere tijd niet bijgehouden, het was groen en zaten allemaal beestjes in. Je kon hier niet in zwemmen. Wanneer je wat te drinken wou bestellen was dit allemaal lauw. De douche ruimte rook naar riool lucht en er was geen zeep om je handen te wassen. Er waren geen handdoeken op de kamer toen we aankwamen, maar deze werden wel al snel geregeld toen we hier om vroegen.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean and the price is reasonable. The hotel is located right in the center of Tam Coc, making it convenient for travel and leisure activities. The female owner of the home is enthusiastic and friendly. I will come back next time.

reviews.title: Fijn
reviews.positives: Super behulpzaam personeel, ze hebben ons veel geholpen met activiteiten en vervoer regelen. Het hotel zelf is nieuw en modern en daardoor ook erg schoon. Het bed lag heerlijk en de kamer was ruim. Douche werkte ook goed. Het ligt iets verder van het centrum (20 minuutjes lopen) maar met de gratis fietsen of scooter huur is dit geen probleem. Door de rustige ligging hadden we ook totaal geen overlast van verkeer of lawaai, wat super fijn was. Een van de betere hotels die we hebben gehad voor deze prijs!

reviews.title: Sehr zu empfehlen
reviews.text: Bin wunschlos glücklich

reviews.title: De perfecte uitvalsbasis om Tam Coc te verkennen
reviews.positives: Goede locatie, prachtig gebouw, super fijn dat er gratis fietsen waren! Het personeel was super vriendelijk en hielp overal mee.

reviews.title: BEST STAY IN TAM COC/NINH BINH
reviews.text: No bullshit this is a great stay. When we first arrived the lobby was beautiful and especially traveling through the different cities , we kind of expected a subpar lobby. Besides that the room was clean, the staff was very friendly and spoke English. The owner cooks you breakfast herself and has a large menu with good portion size. They helped us with booking any immediate transportation and any tours we wanted at equal or competitive rates. I literally have no complaints. Please come here and support them. And also they have a cute corgi running around.

reviews.title: Perfect verblijf
reviews.positives:
Net gerenoveerd met super behulpzaam personeel.
De eigenaresse had zelfs na het missen van het ontbijt wat kleins voor mij klaargemaakt om te eten nadat ik wakker werd

reviews.title: Clean, Peaceful, Great Staff
reviews.text:
I've had a great stay in this hotel! The room is so clean, bed is comfortable to sleep in, and the most amazing part is the big window with overlooking view of the neighbourhood and limestone karsts! 

The lounge area is so spacious, there are a lot of sofas you can sit in while waiting for check-in or your when you check out. There are bicycles that are free to use. 

The staff are so nice and helpful, especially the lady in the reception area who is also the one cooking the breakfast for the guests. She's so helpful, even booking a van for me to return to Hanoi and always offering assistance. 

The neighbourhood is very quiet and peaceful, there are nearby cafes that are only a short walk away from the hotel. The hotel is also close to the center.

It's overall great, I'll definitely stay there again in the future.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: O quarto tinha uma boa área, havia bicicletas gratuitas o que foi mesmo muito útil. O staff era impecável e muito disponível. Têm tours a bons preços e organizam tudo por nós. Adorámos fazer o de Trang An e Mua Cave! O serviço de lavandaria também foi útil. O pequeno almoço é agradável. O quarto é simples, mas bom.

reviews.title: SUPERB
reviews.text: I arrived at 3am and the lady handed me a key to my room and I went to sleep. Lovely room with amazing views. Beautiful bathroom. Free bicycle too. Nice staff. Breakfast enough to start your day. Absolutely recommended ♥️👌🏽

reviews.title: アットホームで清潔なホテル
reviews.positives: 去年Tam Coc Guest House & Hostelに泊まり、とても気に入ったのでもう一度泊まることにしました。オーナーのご厚意により、新しいTam Coc Guest House Oneに値段も同じで泊まらせてもらうことになり、とても快適に過ごす事ができました。レンタル自転車、朝ごはん、水など全て込みの料金です。部屋、共有サロン、トイレはいつも清潔で、洗濯も有料ですが頼めて助かりました。何より一番嬉しかったのは働いている方々が私達を覚えてくれていて、おもてなしをしてくれた事です。とてもおすすめします。
reviews.negatives: 特に無し

reviews.title: Best Hotel Experience in Vietnam
reviews.text: I absolutely agree to give the highest review for this hotel. I have been to many hotels in Vietnam—Danang, HCMC, Hanoi, Sapa, Vung Tau, and Lagi—and this is the best one in my experience. They can communicate in English. The room is wide. The manager and everyone there are helpful. They clean the rooms every day. Free bicycle is provided. Breakfast is just simple. Room, location, price, and service are more than the price. I would love to give a review on every social media and recommend it to my friends who will visit Ninh Binh.

reviews.title: vui vẻ, thanh bình
reviews.positives: Chủ khách sạn rất thân thiện và nhiệt tình hỗ trợ. Giá cả hợp lý, có bao gồm bữa sáng. Không gian yên tĩnh, sân vườn đẹp, phòng rộng rãi. Có xe đạp miễn phí sử dụng, thang máy tiện lợi. Đặc biệt có chó rất dễ thương, tạo cảm giác gần gũi như ở nhà. Khá gần khu trung tâm nên rất ổn.
reviews.negatives:
Tuy nhiên, nhà vệ sinh có mùi hơi khó chịu, có thể do hệ thống thoát nước đang gặp vấn đề nên mong khách sạn sớm kiểm tra và cải thiện thêm về cơ sở vật chất. Phòng không có tivi, có thể sẽ hơi bất tiện với một số khách.
Nhìn chung là một nơi phù hợp để nghỉ ngơi, thư giãn trong không gian yên bình

reviews.title: THE BEST HOTEL IN NINH BINH
reviews.text: The property is sparkling clean and beautifully maintained, with modern rooms and very comfortable beds. The location is perfect!  just a short walk or bike ride to Tam Coc’s breathtaking boat rides and local attractions. What truly sets this guest house apart is the staff: they are the nicest people I’ve ever met. Warm, welcoming, and always ready to help, they made me feel completely at home.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ, giá cũng ổn, sảnh chờ ở tầng 1 khá rộng rãi, nhiều bàn ghế và mát mẻ
reviews.negatives: Mình ở phòng 4 người và phòng này không có ghế để ngồi trang điểm, công tắc điện cũng không tiện khi muốn tắt đèn, nó hơi xa so với giường

reviews.title: Comfortable value place with free breakfast
reviews.text: I highly recommend this homely place with great windown views, hot showers, AC and free breakfast. It is a great place to start you Tam Coc adventures. I was even provided an early check- in. 😁👍

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ , nhân viên nhiệt tình
reviews.negatives: Nên có thêm gương ở bàn

reviews.title: Great facilities
reviews.text: I was here one night , and the facilities were unbeatable - they really do have free bikes, also they let me shower in the afternoon after checkout which was amazing, they have laundry and are pretty central - if that is what you are looking for

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Chị chủ dễ thương, các bạn nhân viên nhiệt tình và dễ gần và cực kỳ hiếu khách, luôn chào hỏi các khách hàng
reviews.negatives: Không có gì để không thích

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Super nice thank you

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Hosts rất tốt bụng & nhiệt tình. 
Homestay có vườn xinh, địa điểm homestay yên tĩnh, thuận lợi để đi các nơi. 
Có xe đạp miễn phí ❤️.

reviews.title: Touring Tom Coc
reviews.text: Very nice place! Free bike for guest.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Chị chủ dễ thương hỗ trợ hết mình luôn, xung quanh yên ắng k quá náo nhiệt nên phù hợp với mình
reviews.negatives: Địa chỉ chôc nghỉ hơi khó kiếm

reviews.title: VERY GOOD !
reviews.text: A very clean hotel, with very kind and helpful hosts. The beds are very comfortable. I recommend it 100%.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Chỗ nghĩ sạch sẽ, thoáng mát. Chị chủ siêu nhiệt tình, hiếu khách

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Very good, very helping staff.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng mới sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Very kind owner.
reviews.text: It was definitely the right choice to stay here. The kind owner welcomed us along with a cute corgi. They arranged a bus to the airport for our return, which we were thankful for. The process was very simple and the price felt reasonable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn mới, có bể bơi, ăn sáng, giá thành hợp lý. Gần những khu du lịch. Đáng để đến trải nghiệm

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The facility is very new, everything is clean. The staff/receptionist is very nice and helpful. The price is reasonable with breakfast included. They have bicycles for free use and bikes for rent.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn mới, phòng mình ở k quá rộng nhưng siêu gọn gàng sạch sẽ. Đặc biệt chị chủ siêu siêu siêu đáng yêu, nhiệt tình, thân thiện. Nếu quay lại Ninh Bình chắc chắn đây sẽ luôn là sự lựa chọn của mình💕
reviews.negatives: Không có gì để chê hết

reviews.title: Definitely recommend!
reviews.text: The staff who work here are amazing. We arrived very early and were allowed to have breakfast and early check in. Our room was clean, the pool was nice, free bicycles were handy and also had cheap mopeds to rent! We enjoyed our time in this hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Phòng sạch, mới, tiện nghi, khu vực yên tĩnh thoáng mát.
Chị chủ và các bạn nhân viên đều rất nhiệt tình.
reviews.negatives: Không có.

reviews.title: Amazing place to stay
reviews.text: This is a great place to stay. Owner and her staff are so welcoming and helpful. You can book all your excursions and get picked up here. The owner and I even played pickleball together at the new tam coc pickleball courts just down the street ( I would also highly recommend playing here. You can drop in and they’ll arrange games for you to play and socialize with you too!) riding their free bikes is a huge bonus.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Phòng nghỉ tiện nghi, sạch sẽ, xe đạp miễn phí, nhân viên thân thiện, gần các điểm thăm quan như Hang Mua, Trang An, Tam Coc, Bích Dộng, Thung nham, khu vực yên tĩnh không gian xanh thoáng.
reviews.negatives: Ko có gì

reviews.title: My stay
reviews.text: The staff stayed up and were prepared for our arrival at 3am. The lady at the desk helped us with our day tour and bus tonight Hoi An. Tam Coc/Ninh Binh is an amazing place and people really should stay here!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Доброжелательность персонала и отличное качество отеля

reviews.title: Great value, great staff, great location
reviews.text: The amenities at this hotel was great. The staff helped with our luggages and helped with booking services to Trang An and other activities. They were an accessible facility which is nice since we had our grandma with us and she could enjoy the lobby and the garden they had. Thank you to Ken and her staff for a great stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Очень хорошее место, новый отель с новыми комнатами и видовыми окнами, очень дружелюбный персонал, готовый помочь в любом вопросе, бесплатные велосипеды. Я думаю лучшего места по соотношению цена/качество в Там Коке не существует

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Nice hotel with very helpful staff. Book transfer for me and give motorbike for rent.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Очень понравился персонал! Очень доброжелательные. Заказали нам трансфер от/до Ханоя. Также забронировали нам билеты на лодку и нам не пришлось стоять в очереди.
Велосипеды бесплатные - на них очень удобно передвигаться до достопримечательностей.
Сам номер комфортный и просторный, есть все необходимое для проживания. Удобные кровати.
Из минусов - на территории были петухи и начинали петь в час ночи, потому пришлось спать с закрытыми окнами

reviews.title: Terrific Stay in Tam Coc
reviews.text: I had a great stay at Tam Coc Guest House One & Hotel. The location was close to many attractions and the free bicyle was convenient to get around. The hotel is very clean and the room comfortable. Best of all, the staff was accommodating and very kind. I would not hesitate to come back to this wonderful hotel the next time I am in Ninh Binh.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Bardzo pomocna obsługa, pokoje ok, śniadania też. Darmowe rowery na wypożyczenie
reviews.negatives: Pokój nie był dobrze posprzątany na nasz przyjazd.

reviews.title: Fantastic stay
reviews.text:
The staff was very helpful. Good English and a true desire to help and show you around. 
The free bicycles were nice and I rented a scooter for the day. 
Nice breakfast. Spotless room. 
301 is extra large with a couch and chairs to sit around

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Personel niesamowicie  mily i pomocny. Pani z recepcji sama wyszla z inicjatywa pomocy. Pokoje nowe, czyste, wzglednie przestronne. Dodatkowo rowery for free co bylo milym urozmaiceniem dnia.
reviews.negatives: Sniadanie mogloby byc bardziej urozmaicone. W pokojach przydaloby sie kilka drobiazgow: wieszak na reczniki, lampka nocna, polka na bagaze.

reviews.title: Amazing place and super comfortable
reviews.text:
We loved this place
Has everything you need and the staff is amazing

reviews.title: Bardzo gorąco polecam ten hotel
reviews.positives: Bardzo Przyjazna obsługa pyszne jedzenie cicho czyściutko Przemiła właścicielka hotelu i bardzo pomocna

reviews.title: Great Stay
reviews.text:
Stayed for 1N. They provided me a big room even though i am 1 person.

I had dinner there and the food is good. There is free bicycle to cycle to tamcoc city. It is a short ride. 

They have a great lobby which i use to rest while waiting for my night bus.

reviews.title: Bardzo gorąco polecam pobyt w tym hotelu
reviews.positives: Bardzo czysty dobry internet bardzo miła obsługa cudowna właścicielka świetne miejsce na relaks cieplutka woda w basenie na dachu Mmmm

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Polecamy to miejsce bo WARTO!
reviews.positives: Cudowna obsługa i atmosfera rodzinna. Wszyscy byli bardzo pomocni! Pokoje bardzo czyste, jasne. Basen na górze z widokiem to coś wspaniałego. Nasz jeden z najlepszych miejsc w Wietnamie. Rowery darmowe do dyspozycji, dzięki którym zwiedziliśmy sporo atrakcji jest dużym atutem. Szkoda, że tak krótko byliśmy bo było cudownie!!! Dziękujemy za wszystko!
reviews.negatives: Wszystko było cudowne!

reviews.title: Polecam gorąco!
reviews.positives:
-kawałek od ulicy więc było cicho
-nowe i czyste pokoje
-ciepła woda
-klimatyzacja
-winda
-super śniadania (mogłoby być więcej owoców 😉)
-super miły personel, który pomoże wszystko załatwić i podpowie co i jak
-można w hotelu załatwić bilety wstępu do różnych atrakcji czy zarezerwować bus do kolejnych miast
-darmowe rowery, dzięki którym można zwiedzać okolice
-na miejscu można zrobić pranie za nieduże pieniądze ☺️
-nie ma problemu z zostawianiem bagaży gdy przyjedzie się za wcześnie 
-internet działa bez zarzutu 
Przyjechałam na dwa dni i postanowiłam przedłużyć pobyt o kolejne dwa dni, pozwolono mi zostać w tym samym pokoju mimo, że zarezerwowałam inny więc dziękuję !
reviews.negatives: Nie ma takich rzeczy ☺️

reviews.title: Lovely hotel
reviews.text: Lovely hotel, clean, free bikes, cute dogs! The staff were so lovely and helpful, they helped us book grabs and find the nearest hospital. Could not recommend enough, perfect

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: З плюсів - песики.
reviews.negatives:
Ми обрали цей готель через велику кількість позитивних відгуків. На жаль, наш досвід виявився зовсім іншим. Номер був дуже незатишний і брудний. У кімнаті не було рушників, зате лежала брудна й огидна розчіска. У ванній — бруд, пліснява і не приємний запах з каналізації. Простирадло та подушки були в плямах. Перед ванною лежав килимок, який також був брудний і неприємний на вигляд.

Найбільше розчарування викликав набір для душу: шампунь у пакетиках і повна відсутність гелю для душу.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Very clean and modern
reviews.text: Very nice and friendly staff. Newly built hotel. Very clean. Great value for the price with basic breakfast included. The staff organised my tour at a great price as well

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Receptionist helpful on arrival giving information about busses and free bikes to use! Lovely lady, very sweet!
reviews.negatives: Couldn’t sleep all night as there was very loud animals in the ceiling which didn’t stop until 8:30 am. Very loud construction started at 7 am. Very bad smell in the bathroom and room due to a drainage problem?

reviews.title: Feels like home away from home
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful stay. The staff were very helpful and accommodating, always ready to assist with any requests. The room was clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, making it easy to relax after a long day. The lounge area has a plenty of cozy sofas, perfect for unwinding. I loved that they offered free bike rentals—it was such a fun and easy way to explore the area.

Overall, I’m really grateful for the warm hospitality, and I’d definitely stay here again.  This is truly unforgettable ☺️💕

Xin Chào meet Bánh mi the corgi 😃

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.positives:
Lovely, friendly staff. 

A little bit of a walk to the main area of Tam Coc but the free bikes were ideal. 

Modern rooms.
reviews.negatives:
The pool was unusable, absolutely filthy.

Rooms were mostly clean but a good deep clean wouldn’t go a miss.

reviews.title: Tam Coc Guest House One
reviews.text:
Convenient location, everyone is very enthusiastic in supporting, from booking rooms to guiding tourist attractions.

Convenient location for traveling to sightseeing places. Really great!

reviews.title: Very homely for a hotel - lovely place to stay
reviews.positives: Staff were very welcoming and helpful!! Pedal bikes free to use - easy to ride to main activities. Lovely garden with cute animals. Downstairs lounge area was very spacious and chilled, homely feel. We had to wait for a night bus and they let us relax there until time to go. Good breakfast freshly made.
reviews.negatives: No towel change/ bed changed through stay.

reviews.title: Unexpected joy
reviews.text: The hotel is about a 3-minute drive from the scenic area, which is very convenient. The hotel offers free bicycles and reasonably priced motorcycle rentals. The rooms are spacious, bright, clean, and hygienic. There is a pool on the top floor, freely accessible. The hotel staff are warm and professional, providing us with great assistance. The hotel lobby is simple and clear, and the lounge area is very comfortable. We are very satisfied and would be willing to return.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice luminous bedroom, good hot shower, free bikes, wifi ok
reviews.negatives: Only toast-egg breakfast, hard bed without blanket

reviews.title: Great accommodation!
reviews.text: It is clean and very cozy. We added 3 more nights after our 2-night stay. The location is just right and quiet. All services are provided at the accommodation. Bicycles are free, and motorcycle rentals are offered at a reasonable price. You can visit all nearby attractions within 10 minutes, and there are many good restaurants in the area. The staff is also friendly. On the day we returned, the hotel even reserved our bus tickets and flight tickets. It was great, and I recommend it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The hostess/manager is really good and enthusiastic, her energy is great and she’s a really nice person.

Rooms are also good, big windows and great beds.
reviews.negatives: The room didn’t have a fridge. breakfast is good but it’s pre-determined, you unfortunately don’t have a choice.

reviews.title: Amazing hotel in Ninh Binh
reviews.text: The building is new with great facilities, including a nice rooftop pool and a comfortable lounge with big sofas. Breakfast is simple but delicious (toast with eggs or soup, plus fruit). They offer free bicycles, motorbike rentals, laundry service, and can also help you book buses to other cities. Overall, it’s excellent value for money, I can’t recommend it enough!

reviews.title: Lovely accommodation
reviews.positives: Very nice accommodation, everything is clean and Ken the receptionist was so friendly!
reviews.negatives: It was quite loud due to the renovation on the roof

reviews.title: Absolutely Amazing!!!
reviews.text: Ms. Ken and all staff at Tam Cốc Guest House are just absolutely amazing. They are extremely kind, generous and informative.  Our family particularly love the bikes available for all guests.  Biking as a family was one of the girls favorite memories.  There are chickens roaming around the side yard/garden.  We can’t thank Ms. Ken and staff enough for all that they’ve done to make our stay at Ninh Bình a memorable and fantastic stay.  Thank you!!!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff were lovely and accomodating.
reviews.negatives: Showers weren’t super hot but just warm. Not their fault!

reviews.title: It's the best accommodation.
reviews.text: The accommodation was newly built, so it was very clean, and the breakfast was deliciously prepared every day, which I loved. The rooftop pool opened in July and was available for use, and they provided free bike rentals every day, making it easy to get anywhere nearby, so the location was excellent. The room I stayed in had a great view, so I didn't feel bored at all even without a TV in the accommodation. The desk staff, Ken, was extremely friendly, and I was grateful that he helped me look for my phone, which I left on the bus coming to Ninh Binh. The view from the front yard was lovely, and when I ordered beer, they also provided fries and sausages as snacks, which made me very happy. If I ever needed more shampoo or shower gel, they always replenished it, and even though I was tired from biking, they immediately offered me a large water bottle, which I appreciated a lot. I am also very thankful for the lovely owner who treated us like family, not just as customers. I definitely want to stay here again when I visit Ninh Binh next time. Thank you so much for having the best Ken at the best accommodation.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very clean and the owners we lovely- they were very happy to help and worked hard to get the room ready for us to check in early after a night bus. 15 min walk to the centre of Tam Coc but with the free bikes it was 5 minutes which is even better. Would definitely recommend.

reviews.title: Very sweet people
reviews.text: Very helpful by cycle free for tour

reviews.title: So damn good, thank you muchly

I’m also pleased with the service and the staff’s enthusiastic support — I requested a room upgrade in the middle of the night, and it was arranged within 5 minutes!
reviews.negatives: The bedroom didn’t have a TV or a fridge, which was a bit inconvenient, and the water pressure was a little low during peak shower hours. Just those two minor points

reviews.title: Beautiful space, clean room.
reviews.text: The place is located in a cool and quiet area. The space is spacious and modern. Everyone should book here.

reviews.title: Very comfortable home stay at Tam Coc for 2 nights
reviews.positives: We enjoyed our 2 nights stay at Tam Coc. Very new hotel and have lift - convenient for the elderly. The staff are very helpful and friendly and help us to book the grab car to nearby restaurant. Overall we enjoyed our stay at Tam Coc , Nihn Bihn

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Chị chủ siêu thân thiện, khách sạn mới và sạch sẽ, có cả bể bơi trên tầng 5, có bao ăn sáng. Highly recommend nha cả nhà

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Very nice and basically brand new hotel. They just opened in the beginning of march, everything is still new and in good shape.

The room:
I had a kingsize bedroom with mountain view. The view is very nice. The room is also very clean and nice. Lots of storage for clothes and luggage. In case it matters to someone, the time I've been here (may 2025), there was no tv installed and also no minibar/fridge.
The room has AC and also a fan. Also they have UV windows.

The staff/service:
The staff tries to help you with everything, e.g. booking busses or tours, ordering a taxi, helping with sim cards, free bicycles and scooters are available for a small fee (150k vnd/ day).
Very friendly and genuine people that run the place.

The breakfast:
Breakfast menu is basic but fine. They offer a few dishes that you can choose from. Besides there's always tea and coffee.

The location:
It's in a new development area a little bit outside of tam coc. It's very quiet and nice in the area. With the bicycle it takes 5min to get to tam coc.

All in all I'm happy to chose this place to stay for a few nights.

reviews.title: New hotel
reviews.text: The newly built hotel has incredibly friendly and enthusiastic staff. I recommend that families traveling choose this new hotel for their trip to Japan.

They also have a cute tiny dog that will love you if you get his attention. 10/10 we extended here 2 times because we didn’t want to leave and location is relaxing and beautiful.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I would like to affirm that this place is the most beautiful among all accommodations in the Tam Cốc area, newly built and always very clean and beautiful. I stayed in a 20m2 room, but it felt very spacious because there are many windows. The owner is also very enthusiastic and lovely. Generally, if anyone is looking for a reasonably priced and clean place to stay for a short trip in Japan, I highly recommend this place!

reviews.title: Comfortable and clean
reviews.positives: Staff were super friendly and helpful, it was great to have bikes available for free to ride around town and explore.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The host is friendly, the place is clean, beautiful, and very comfortable. 😍

reviews.title: Will 100% stay again in the future!
reviews.positives:
The staff who work here make you feel like part of the family and their service is amazing, no matter what you need help with! 

They helped arrange bicycles free of charge, we had breakfast included every morning, motorbikes ready to use everyday, snacks in reception to purchase at a better price than in town, and they can even arrange tours/transfers. The location is only a 10 minute walk to the town and you can take a scenic route through the fields and see how the locals work and live.

Special thanks to Hieu + Ken + Huong + An and the big dog Banh My, little dog Bear!!
reviews.negatives: The pool didn’t have any sun loungers but it’s clear they were doing work to improve the rooftop area so maybe it’s already in the future plans.

reviews.title: 2-day 1-night trip
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, and the reception is very welcoming. I will return for the next trip.

reviews.title: The highlight was the receptionist Ken! She is the star of the show!
reviews.positives: It’s very new, so it’s very nice and clean. Very comfortable bed and fully equipped bathroom. The swimming pool is great on the roof top and there is a lovely garden on the ground floor. They also lend us their bikes and it was amazing to find myself in the middle of gigantic mountains and rice fields . The receptionist “Ken” was so helpful! Helped me to buy new reading glasses that I had lost, sent me to the best tours, found me the best transport, booked my next step of my trip and so on… always with a lovely smile.

reviews.response:
Dear Joseph Snyder, 
Thank you very much for staying with us at Tam Coc Guest House One. It is our pleasure to hear that you enjoyed your stay. We really do appreciate that you took time to share your wonderful review. Your compliment is the biggest encouragement for us to keep up working and maintain our service. We look forward to the pleasure of welcome you back. 
Best regards, Tam Coc Guest House One’s Management.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.response:
Chào chị Nguyễn Tâm, 
Cảm ơn chị đã lựa chọn Tam Coc Guest House One cho chuyến du lịch tại Ninh Bình. Những lời khen của chị về chất lượng dịch vụ tại khách sạn là món quà tinh thần rất lớn đối với đội ngũ ban quản lý cũng như nhân viên khách sạn, chúng tôi luôn cố gắng hoàn thiện hơn nữa để luôn mang lại những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tới từng khách hàng tại Tam Coc Guest House One.
Khách sạn mong được tiếp đón chị cùng bạn bè và gia đình nhiều lần hơn nữa trong tương lai.
Cảm ơn chị  khách sạn Tam Coc Guest House One.

reviews.title: A great place to stay in Ninh Binh.
reviews.positives: The staff were very friendly and attentive accompanied by a lovely little Corgi who lives at the hotel. Breakfast was included which was a great added bonus. The rooms were a decent size and the beds were very comfortable. There was also an added bonus of being able to use the hotels bikes for free (which a lot of places charge you to use) which is a great way to get around and see Ninh Binh. Overall I really enjoyed my stay here and I’d come back again.
reviews.negatives: My only negative was that the plumbing/drain in my bathroom often caused a smell. However, I have had this throughout a few places in Vietnam, so I do think this is down to the plumbing here in general.

reviews.title: Fue mejor de lo que esperabamos
reviews.text:
El alojamiento es nuevo, super lindo y la gente es un 1000. 
Todos super amables, nos gestionaron el bus a Hoi An, nos dieron bicis gratis todos los dias, la limpieza de 10 y la habitación super amplia. 
El desayuno lo hacen en el momento y podes elegir dentro de 6 opciones, probamos 4 de ellos y estaban deliciosos. Lo recomiendo y volveria sin dudarlo

reviews.title: Hip & new with free bikes and caring staff!
reviews.positives:
We kept on prolonging our stay and felt sad when we had to leave. Our reason to choose this hotel was the cheap price and free use good and new bicycles and the good location to see the treasures of Ninh Binh area. Price/quality is astonishing. Rooms are like the pictures, I was kind of suspicious because of the grey facade picture but really it's a great hotel with lovely caring staff.

The hotel is situated on a peaceful location just on the edge of the tourist center of Tam Coc. (We personally like not only to stumble over Europeans)

The service is amazing. Kien is so sweet and helps you with an honest smile. She speaks very well English and replies fast by WhatsApp & booking messages even if she's not at the desk - other staff isn't fluent in English but helpful and caring and have a translator ready on their phone. We felt welcome and watched after. Kien gave us so many nice tips where to go on bike. She also arranged our transfer to Cat Ba on our last minute request.

In the lobby you find comfortable large sofas and also board games (chess and other...). Brand new hotelrooms with great airco and a fan. European standard. The most beautiful and practical wardrobe space ever, convenient bathroom with toileteries). Good elevator to service the 3 floors (each 7 rooms) and go to the rooftop pool. It's a cosy clean and also classy.

I have never seen so many great bicycles at a hotel in Vietnam, they are new and you can adjust the height easily, no chain but the band system!! With 3 speed acceleration and bike light (not all with working backlight but really this feels so much safer already when it's dark) they even have a lock!

The rooftop pool is magic at night. Clean and new - Really deep - so it's great for teenagers and adults but also with a shallow area for smaller kids (you need to surveil them of course! No swimming vests)

Breakfast is simple but perfect for a start up your day.
reviews.negatives: Not a problem for me but just handy to know: no fridge in your room' so also no noise at night. if you need to the staff is happy to store something for you in the kitchen fridge.

reviews.title: Great hotel in Tam Coc
reviews.text:
Quite place, few minutes away from Tam Coc center. You can use a bike for free to reach the center, or use Grab Moto, only 5 minutes driving. 
Ken is very nice, always smiling and accomodating. Great price for a great room. Swimming pool on the roof top is amazing especially during sunset. I totally recommend this place :)

reviews.title: Amazing stay!
reviews.positives: The room was clean, modern and spacious. The staff was lovely. On arrival they told me every attraction in Ninh Binh, they were happy to help me with anything. They have moterbikes and bicycles at the hotel which was amazing.

reviews.title: C’était un très bon moment, j’ai même prolongé
reviews.text:
Super, personnelles très gentils et compétents
Bicyclettes gratuites, moto à louer
Service pour le lavage
Ils font de très bonne recommandation 
Service de massothérapie qui vient sur place

reviews.title: Fabulous guest house
reviews.positives: The guest house was brilliant! It's a very modern building with great amenities. The room is very spacious and comfortable with amazing views. The host is so kind and helpful and helped with things like booking my bus which comes to the guest house to pick you up.  Great location also as it's just a short cycle or bike ride into Tam Coc. Would definitely recommend it to anyone, especially for the very cute corgi dog.

reviews.title: Excellent hôtel
reviews.text: L’hôtel est neuf et d’une grande qualité. Le personnel est adorable et aux petits soins. De plus vous pouvez louer des vélos gratuitement pour vous balader dans Tam Coc et sa région ou louer un scooter pour la journée !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Almost new hotel, big room, new furniture, clean. Hotel owner is very helpful and very kind person.The hotel is not in the rocks but has bicycle and motorbike rent, you need transport to fo around any way. Near is cheap market where you can buy basic vegetables and fruits.

reviews.title: One of my best hotels in Vietnam
reviews.text: The hotel is great, close to the center (10min by bike), the hotel spaces are clean and neat, spacious room, the staff is very friendly and kind. I recommend without worries

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Very modern and clean, breakfast was really good loved the coffee too. Would definitely come back again. Staff were very lovely ! 
The doggy there is really cute too if you love corgis.
reviews.negatives: Tiny bit smelly in the bathroom but I wouldn’t let that discourage you from staying it such a lovely stay overall.

reviews.title: Très bon mais..
reviews.text: L'hôtel était de grande qualité et le personnel aussi. Cependant nous avons été choqués par les propriétaires qui ébouillantaient les canards vivants. C'est une façon cruelle de tuer ces pauvres animaux

reviews.title: Relaxing modern personal retreat
reviews.positives: I really liked how warm and caring the staff were during  my stay. The facilities match the pictures online. Very clean.  Some staff speak English more than others. Their pet corgi is absolutely adorable.  I truly enjoyed my stay and I am sad to go. This is the type of place you think you will be there for a short time but it's so convenient, clean, warm and  peacful you just want to stay longer.   I extended my stay by two nights on my packed itinerary. On a personal note when I wasn't feeling well I was offered water and pain relief medication that did wonders! I was also followed up with regarding how I was feeling multiple times. They even offered to have a doctor visit, very thoughtful. So grateful for this kindness. As a solo traveller figuring out  my adventures and navigating a horrible headache,  your warm welcome and care really made my stay. Thank you so much, I hope to have the pleasure  of visiting again for longer. Until we meet again!
reviews.negatives: More fruit offerings would be nice but it didn't take away from my experience.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Hôtel propre, le personnel est incroyable ils sont toujours disponibles pour vous aider, ils ont gardé nos valises toute la journée et ils nous ont proposé de prendre des douches. Cet hôtel est vraiment incroyable.

reviews.title: Hotel excelente pero no compren otros servicios ahí.
reviews.positives: El hotel impecable, la habitación cómoda, pedimos comida ahí y todo muy bien! También te dejan usar las instalaciones después del check out hasta el horario del viaje
reviews.negatives: Nos vendieron ahí un bus “vip” pagamos carísimo y le pedimos vip porque eran muchas horas, el encargado del hotel que nos tenía que acompañar al bus nos subió en otro, a los pocos minutos nos hicieron cambiar y el bus era un asco, todo sucio, ya nuestros asientos los habían usado otras personas, reclamé pero no se hicieron cargo de nada
